feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Documents not getting Downloaded - All Modules
entry.content:
500 - Internal error coming when trying to download documents from Recruitment and from all other modules when clicking on the link to download documents it's just not getting downloading.

We have even tried resetting the password for Open Text and established the connection again, but nothing seems to be working. 

If anyone has come across such an error, please respond on the same as this is a priorty issue and any suggestions would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Replication of Job Tile Translations from EC to ECP.
entry.content:
Hello,
Good day!.

We have a requirement where we need to replicate the translations of Job Title field from EC to ECP,
Is it possible for the translations along with English to be replicated via any kind of job or field mapping?

Thank you.

entry.title: Cannot connect to a service - Build code to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hello, I am developing an extension in SAP Build Code, and when trying to add a SSFF service, it does not appear as available.

 

 

The BTP Trial account has already been registered in the SSFF product, and the destination has been created.

 

 

As mentioned in the help documentation, it seems that this tool is not available when using the Full-Stack Application with the Productivity Tools dev space.

 

 

I would like to know if there is another way to add a SuccessFactors service in SAP Build Code within a Full-Stack Application project using the Productivity Tools dev space.

Has anyone else experienced the same issue?
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Cancel Right To Return for Terminated employees in LOA
entry.content:
Can we create a business rule to cancel right to return if an employee was in Leave of Absence (LOA) ? 

we are having a number of employee on Leave that are terminated, where the right to return is causing us issue

because HR didn't create a End of Leave of Absence before the termination.

we would like to avoid having to manually fix those cases by :

- cancelling termination

- adding Time Off> End of Leave

- re-create termination

since it's time consuming and also cause the termination to be sent twice (which will cause additional errors to be received by Third party systems)

entry.title: How can I link to a Success Factors function that appears in an overlay visually?
entry.content:
Success Factors employee central has a number of features that appear as overlays to the home page, rather than separate pages with unique URLs. An example (on our instance) is the delegate function, a simple workflow that opens as a overlay over the home screen (see attached pic) when the delegate tile is selected. 

I want to deep link to the delegate function from a Work Zone page giving guidance around the delegate function. How can I do this?

entry.title: 1H 2025 Release - New export button on scheduled job manager
entry.content:
Hello SAP community!

I hope you"re doing well.

I’m reaching out regarding the new "Export" button now available on the Scheduled Job Manager page as part of the 1H 2025 Release.

Could you please provide more details on how this functionality works? I tested it and noticed that it appears to export all jobs rather than allowing the selection of a specific job to export. I would appreciate clarification on what information is included in the export and if there are any options available to customize or filter the exported data.

Understanding this will help us better adapt to the new functionality and ensure we are using it effectively.

Thank you very much for your support!

entry.title: CC users not receiving the correct email
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Good day!

I just want to ask why am I receiving the wrong email template as CC?

Instead of the e-wallet number cc email confirmation, I am getting the EC_Submit_Request which is for the approver?

Is there something wrong with my configuration?

Thank you for all the help.

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP SF EC Time Management, when an employee applies for leave, the request should go to their manager and get approved — how can this be achieved?

entry.title: Date range on calculated column
entry.content: We have a report request to calculate days worked within a period based on position entry date or hire date. We have added a calculated column with %As_of_date% on position entry date and now when running the report with a date range it doesn't calculate just the days worked within the period selected in the date range, it is giving the total days worked from start of position entry date to today and not as an example Jan 1st to Mar 31st and just giving those days worked within the period. We need to see how many days the employee worked within the period. Any suggestions on how we could get this working in Advanced reporting in EC and if it's even possible.

entry.title: How can I link to a Success Factors function that appears in an overlay visually?
entry.content:
Success Factors employee central has a number of features that appear as overlays to the home page, rather than separate pages with unique URLs. An example (on our instance) is the delegate function, a simple workflow that opens as a overlay over the home screen (see attached pic) when the delegate tile is selected. 

I want to deep link to the delegate function from a Work Zone page giving guidance around the delegate function. How can I do this?

And I am aware of the deep links documentation, and no, it doesn't cover this scenario.

entry.title: Disadvantages or negative things of using user creations using APIS
entry.content:
Hello Team good morning, afternoons or nights!

Could you help me to comment on whether there are any contradictions or disadvantages in using employee creation via APIS?

Thank you very much for your answers, greetings!

entry.title: Mandatory Data Types
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently importing employee data for a client that is migrating to SuccessFactors. We have had several iterations of the migration, and after the last iteration, the client decided not to import a certain type of data, Compensation Information.

Is it going to be possible to import the rest of the data without any issue or is it a mandatory field that must never be avoided, when importing employee data? Are there data types that are essential for data migration at all, without which the import of the rest of the data will not work, return an error etc.?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: How do I report on Alternative Cost Distribution in Table/Canvas report?
edit directory search column label
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Please how to edit column labels in the directory search functionality (I've tried to use manage languages but it doesn't work on these columns)

entry.title: country list in the national id block
entry.content: Hello experts, Please is it possible to show the picklist of ALL countries in the national id block without creating a new format for each country?

entry.title: hide pay component section in the compensation info bloc
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In the compensation info bloc, the client wants only to show specific fields about benefits such as "eligible for car", eligible for bonus... Is it possible to hide reccruring pay component and pay target sub-sections?

entry.title: Mandatory Fields for CSV Import
entry.content:
Hello,

When importing data via "Import Employee Data" transaction, is there a way to manage which columns for the CSV file are mandatory for the import or not?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: how do i put in order external code in options list center
entry.content: How do I put external code in order in the options list center, it is not replicating the information

entry.title: EC Business Rule related to limiting record creation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have created two payment types under bank information std portlet . and requirement is user should be able to created one record per payment types for an year . Any clue how should we go about this approach

For ex:- If payment type is payroll bank then only record should exist visa versa for other subtype of payment type. 

I guess we can control the record creation via business rule. All suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks

Ritanshi

entry.title: Invalid Internal Candidate Record Created in RCM-Can't Hire this External Hire using MPH: Release
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

While testing the H1 2025 SuccessFactors Maintenance Release, we ran into an issue where we are unable to hire External Hires in Manage Pending Hires (MPH) in EC.  After bringing the Candidate through the ATS, and Onboarding 1.0, after all the required fields are updated in MPH and we select to hire the new employee, we receive an error message which prevent us from hiring.  

I'd like to know if anyone else has been experiencing anything similar in your Release/Preview Environment while testing for the H1 2025 Release.  Here's the process and I give you the error message as well.

Info:

The testing was done using the Legacy Candidate Workbench (Candidate Pipeline) in Release.  We are also using Onboarding 1.0.

Reproducing the issue:

1. User create job requisition & posts externally

2. External candidate applies to the job

3. System creates the external candidate profile record (correctly)

4. User takes the new hire through the ATS and initiates onboarding

5. System creates the new Post Hire Verification (PHV) Activity for thew New Hire (both US and Global scenarios apply)

6. User completes the PHV step in Onboarding 1.0.

7. System Creates the Internal Candidate Profile for the New Hire (Candidate profile record is invalid.  Candidate ID is created as "1" which is not normal.  Cannot access the internal candidate profile - get an error when clicking on it.

8. User completes the remaining Onboarding steps

9. Onboarding sends required information to EC - OCI record creates and new hire is flagged as ready to hire

10. User attempts to hire the new hire in MPH

11. System returns an error message and doesn't allow the hire.

Error Message says: "An error occurred when creating a new internal candidate for the hire (user ID 1XXXXXX). Please ask your administrator to ensure the candidate is created in the system."

We have an SAP incident open, and they are reviewing this, but we would like to see if anyone else is experiencing this issue.  Any information could lead to a quicker resolution.

Thank you!
